info.title: Markup AI API.
info.description: API interface for Markup AI content processing workflows.

get.description: Retrieve all style guides associated with your organization.

example.summary: This is the summary generated for this style guide

example.name: AP
example.summary: This is the summary generated for this style guide

401.description: Authentication failed or no valid API key provided.

Validation Error.detail: style_guide_id is not a valid UUID

Internal Server Error.detail: An internal server error occurred. Please try again or contact support with the request ID if the issue persists.

post.description: Create a new style guide from a document, or copy an existing style guide. To copy, provide the copyFrom query parameter with the source style guide ID.

parameters.name: copyFrom

schema.description: The ID of an existing style guide to copy. When provided, creates a copy instead of processing a document.
schema.title: Copyfrom

parameters.description: The ID of an existing style guide to copy. When provided, creates a copy instead of processing a document.

201.description: Style guide copied successfully (when using copyFrom).

Style Guide Copied.name: My Custom Style Guide (Copy)
Style Guide Copied.summary: This is the summary generated for this style guide

202.description: Style guide creation started successfully (when using file_upload).

Style Guide Creation Started.name: My Custom Style Guide
Style Guide Creation Started.summary: This is the summary generated for this style guide

Both Provided.detail: Cannot provide both file_upload and copyFrom. Use file_upload to create from a document, or copyFrom to copy an existing style guide.

Neither Provided.detail: Must provide either file_upload or copyFrom query parameter.

Name Required.detail: Name is required when creating a style guide from a document.

Not Completed.detail: Cannot copy a style guide that is not completed.

401.description: Authentication failed or no valid API key provided.

Forbidden.detail: Permission against the organization is required for this operation.

Limit Reached.detail: Style guide limit reached for this organization.

Predefined.detail: Predefined style guides cannot be copied.

404.description: Source style guide not found (when using copyFrom).

409.description: A style guide with this name already exists

Duplicate Name.detail: A style guide with this name already exists in your organization.

Too Many Copies.detail: Too many copies of this style guide exist. Please provide a unique name.

413.description: The uploaded file exceeds the maximum allowed size.

errors.msg: Value error, File must be one of the following content types: ...

Internal Server Error.detail: An internal server error occurred. Please try again or contact support with the request ID if the issue persists.

post.summary: Import terminology from CSV or ACTIF XML
post.description:
Uploads a CSV or ACTIF XML file and imports terminology.

**CSV Format Requirements:**
- CSV must include columns: Prohibited, Preferred, Context-Dependent, Instructions, Domains
- The first row must contain the column headers in the exact same order as shown above
- Multiple values within a single cell should be separated by semicolons with a space (e.g., term1; term2; term3)
- Empty cells are allowed
- The CSV import format is the same as the CSV export format.

get.description:
Searches the text for relevant terminology and returns matched term sets.

Term sets are matched if any word sequence (up to 5 words) in the text is similar to one of the terms of the term set.
The similarity measure used is a trigram similarity of 0.5 or higher between the word sequence and the term.

post.description:
Create terms that should be matched in the text. The term types are:

* **preferred**: this is the preferred term for the associated term set
* **prohibited**: this term should not be used to talk about the term set
* **context_dependent**: this term is correct in certain cases, but incorrect in others, the instructions field of the term set should explain when the term is correct and when it is incorrect

post.description:
Reset or update throttle configuration for an API key.

This endpoint allows you to:
- Reset to a safe default (1000% of 1 GSU)
- Set a custom GSU percentage
- Override TPM/TPS limits directly
- Clear AIMD state to start fresh
- Reset cooldown timers

post.description:
Manually trigger the abandoned signup follow-up job.

This job identifies users who verified their email but never created an organization,
and sends them a follow-up email to complete their profile.

Args:
    dry_run: If True, return preview of users who would receive emails without sending
    email_filter: Optional regex pattern to filter emails (for testing)

patch.description:
Cancel the downgrade request for the organization.

This will:
1. Find the order with cancel_at_period_end=True and next_order_id pointing to a pending order
2. Delete the pending order (next_order)
3. Set cancel_at_period_end=False and next_order_id=None on the current order
4. Update Stripe subscription to cancel the downgrade

AgentType.title: AgentType
AgentType.description:
Type of agent executor.

- YAML: Prompt -> LLM -> structured output (single-step)
- ACTIVITY: @activity.defn function (deterministic, can do I/O)
- WORKFLOW: @workflow.defn class (orchestrator, can call child workflows)

examples.msg: Input should be a valid integer, unable to parse string as an integer

filename.title: Filename

tags.name: Account Access Control
tags.description: Manage roles and permissions for the organization.

tags.name: API Keys
tags.description: Manage API keys for accessing the Markup AI API.

tags.name: Members
tags.description: Manage organization members, invitations, and roles.

tags.name: Internal
tags.description: Endpoints meant to support Acrolinx products, but not intended for public use. These will be accessible in production, but not publicly documented.

tags.name: Products
tags.description: Product management endpoints for subscription plans and pricing.

tags.name: Subscription
tags.description: Subscription management endpoints for creating and managing subscriptions.

tags.name: Cortex Agents
tags.description: Cortex agent execution and management endpoints for LLM-based workflows.

tags.name: Cortex Workflows
tags.description: Cortex workflow status, results, and streaming endpoints for agent execution.

tags.name: Style Guides
tags.description: Endpoints related to creating, updating, and organizing style guides for content consistency across teams.

tags.name: Style Checks
tags.description: Analyze your content to spot issues that go against your style guide or brand voice. Use this to catch tone, grammar, or readability problems before publishing.

tags.name: Style Suggestions
tags.description: Get detailed results from style checks, including flagged issues and suggestions for how to fix them. Perfect for polishing content and staying on-brand.

tags.name: Style Rewrites
tags.description: Includes all information from style suggestions, plus a rewrite of the text.
